entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop affected by smut disease

entities.name: SMUT
entities.description: A seed-transmitted disease caused by Moesziomyces penicillariae

entities.name: MOESZIOMYCES PENICILLARIAE
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes smut in pearl millet

entities.name: FUNGICIDE SEED TREATMENT
entities.description: A treatment used to inhibit the viability of smut spores on seed surfaces

entities.name: SODIUM HYDROXIDE
entities.description: A chemical treatment tested at various concentrations to prevent spore ball germination

entities.name: POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE
entities.description: A chemical treatment tested at various concentrations to prevent spore ball germination

entities.name: ETHANOL
entities.description: A chemical treatment used to prevent spore ball germination and as part of the seed stirring treatment

entities.name: SPORE BALL GERMINATION
entities.description: The biological process of smut spore balls growing, which the study aims to inhibit

entities.name: SEED STIRRING TREATMENT
entities.description: A method of stirring infected seeds with sterilized sand and ethanol to eliminate spore balls

entities.name: STERILIZED SAND
entities.description: An abrasive material used in the seed stirring treatment to remove spore balls

entities.name: QUARANTINE PROCESSING
entities.description: The process of managing germplasm to prevent the spread of diseases

entities.name: SEED CERTIFICATION PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Programs designed to ensure the quality and health of seeds

entities.name: TRANSBOUNDARY MOVEMENT
entities.description: The movement of seeds across international borders
